title: 11 Herbal Teas for Older Adults with Varicose Veins
description: Vaccinium myrtillus teas, also known as bilberry tea, may help with varicose veins due to its rich content of anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that improve blood vessel function and reduce inflammation. These compounds help to strengthen the walls of blood vessels and improve circulation, which can alleviate the symptoms of varicose veins such as pain, swelling, and discoloration.
